narrative: A Recommendation Systems Engineer at Nykaa with eight years of experience, coming from a product‑first environment, leads the profile. Strong verified skill depth was the primary driver of the ranking. The candidate has hands‑on work with LlamaIndex and Haystack to build retrieval pipelines, and familiarity with Qdrant vector storage and PEFT fine‑tuning, directly matching the search‑and‑retrieval focus of the role. Nonetheless, the JD‑relevant skill match sits below the pool average, platform engagement is modest, and there are minor credibility concerns, which together limit the overall score.
